message:
perf(mux): convert all control messages to binary

Converted remaining JSON messages to binary format:
- sendFocusPanel: [0x83, panel_id (u32)]
- sendClosePanel: [0x81, panel_id (u32)]
- sendViewAction: [0x88, panel_id (u32), action_len (u8), action]

No more JSON.stringify calls in the frontend codebase.
